_note: Butchery loot is authored PER CREATURE on each mob's `butcheryLoot` array in Data/mobs.json — this file is schema reference only and is NOT loaded by the engine. Each entry is typed (meat | hide | bone | feather) and rolled independently; a creature that yields feathers simply carries `feather` entries and no `hide` entry. A mob's `butcheryXp` is awarded to the butcher (a party member with the butchery profession) for each corpse butchered.

entrySchema.qty: <fixed quantity>  — or use minQty/maxQty for a range
